queue.name: Moneygate truth check
queue.action: Check Stripe balance and payment intents before any progress claim.

queue.name: Collapse to one first sale offer
queue.action: Use 49 EUR Signal Audit as the primary sale; use 19 EUR First Signal Check only as fallback.

queue.name: Named prospect conversion
queue.action: Use existing sent threads and relevant private routes. No new broad asset building.

queue.name: Delivery readiness
queue.action: When payment appears, stop outreach and deliver the audit immediately.

queue.name: Deployment target
queue.action: Vercel has no projects and Replit needs reauthentication. Use GitHub and Airtable as control plane until deploy target is connected.
